label: Web App Security
description: Find and exploit common web vulnerabilities like XSS and SQL injection in a safe, interactive sandbox.

label: Network & System
description: Explore how networks and services talk to each other by solving packet, port, and protocol puzzles.

label: Crypto & Binary
description: Practice encoding, decoding, and classic ciphers used in cryptography and binary analysis.

label: General
description: Build foundational skills with terminal exploration, reconnaissance, and logical reasoning missions.
